title: dortmanna humifusa
intro: Dortmanna humifusa, also known as American goldenseal, is a perennial plant native to North America. It contains medicinal properties such as berberine, which has antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The health benefits of Dortmanna humifusa include its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and aid in digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is also used topically to treat skin conditions such as eczema and wounds.
